reviews.review_description: You can easily create moving animation which is a big plus,  and with a Gamepad the controls are intuitive which makes for a pretty smooth flow of things.  but the resolution is a joke,  you have a choice of what looks like 1 x 1 foot boxes or 2 x 2 inch boxes as the smallest pixel size. so a single dot from the pen is ridiculously big almost like you were looking at the screen with a magnifying glass..  and now that i said that out loud i realize how stupid that sounds seeing as thats exactly what im doing, but if they just allow a way bigger canvas and the ability to zoom out far enough it would solve this big issue..  also seeing as this is a paint program for virtual reality,  why is it still a 2d "wrap around"  canvas when it should be in 3d? if it were i wouldn't complain about the pixels nearly as much..  all and all its an ok paint program.  but it needs work

But could be much better. A few things needed to be perfect. Ability to save as gif. Ability to import sprites/images. A ghost image of the last frame so you know where to draw next. Apart from that really neat

reviews.review_title: Reviewed at twistedvr on you tube
reviews.review_description: Its ok but not great go to my channel to see the app and my review
Absolutely brilliant. Had to get this! Had a go on my friends and just bought it myself.

reviews.review_title: My 4 years old nephew loves it
reviews.review_description: My nephew play with it over 30 minutes. It's super cool VR toy for kids. Please add GIF export.
